overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character navigating through a dark industrial interior with metal walkways and warm firelight, exiting into a foggy outdoor area with dead trees and distant red-lit structures. The atmosphere is ominous and survival-horror themed with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with metal walkways and fire braziers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the metal walkway toward the exit doorway at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: metal grate walkway flooring spanning the corridor
rough stone wall with industrial piping attached
burning fire pit providing warm orange light
large metal pipes running along the back wall
red fabric banner hanging on the left wall
dark exit doorway at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a metal grate walkway inside an industrial facility, passing fire braziers and stone walls while heading toward a distant exit doorway. Warm artificial light from the fires contrasts with the dark metal surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between corrugated metal walls

events.description: character exits the industrial building through a doorway into a darker passage
ambient light drops significantly as character moves into unlit corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow dark passage leading from the interior to the exterior

entered.detail: rusted corrugated metal sheeting on the right side
confined dirt pathway between metal walls

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow dark passage with corrugated metal walls, the character transitions from the lit interior to the unlit exterior. The lighting drops significantly as the outdoor foggy area becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest with dead trees and distant red-lit ruins

events.description: character emerges from corridor into outdoor foggy forest area
red-lit industrial structures become visible through the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating through the foggy woods toward distant red lights

entered.detail: leafless dead trees scattered throughout the foggy area
distant industrial building illuminated with red neon lights
rusted metal fencing partially visible through fog

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a foggy outdoor area filled with dead trees, the character navigates toward distant industrial ruins illuminated by red lights. The environment shifts from enclosed to open with sparse vegetation and low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense fog area with extremely low visibility

events.description: fog density increases significantly reducing visibility to near zero

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through extremely dense fog with limited visibility

entered.detail: thick atmospheric fog obscuring the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues through increasingly dense fog that reduces visibility to near zero. Dead trees fade into the background as the thick atmospheric haze dominates the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial interior into an oppressive, fog-shrouded wasteland. It begins on a metal grate walkway where warm light from fire braziers contrasts with dark stone walls as the character heads toward a distant exit. As the camera moves through a narrow passage of corrugated metal, the warm artificial glow fades, transitioning into a cold, unlit exterior. The scene then opens into a desolate outdoor area filled with dead trees and distant industrial ruins illuminated by ominous red lights. Finally, the environment shifts from an open landscape to a void of near-zero visibility as the character pushes deeper into a thick, dominating atmospheric haze.
